LAW AND MOTION 301, PLAINTIFF KENNETH KINNARD'S MOTION FOR LEAVE TO AMEND COMPLAINT UNDER CCP 473. LEAVE TO AMEND IS GRANTED TO ADD STATEMENT OF FACTS AND CLAIM FOR THEFT, AND TO RESTATE CLAIM FOR CONVERSION AS TO EXISTING DEFENDANT ABC. LEAVE TO AMEND IS DENIED AS TO REMAINING CAUSES OF ACTION AND NEW DEFENDANT PAT'S LIENS BECAUSE IT WOULD PREJUDICE DEFENDANT BY UNFAIRLY EXPANDING SCOPE OF CASE TOO CLOSE TO TRIAL AND AFTER CLOSE OF DISCOVERY. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR #8189

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-13-2006 Advanced From Dec-20-06 To Dec-13-06 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 306

Plaintiff Kenneth Kinard Dba P&K Trucking'S Motion For Leave To Amend Comlaint Under Ccp 473
Off Calendar Dec-13-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFF KENNETH KINNARD'S MOTION FOR LEAVE TO AMEND COMPLAINT UNDER CCP 473. Leave to amend is granted to add statement of facts and claim for theft, and to restate claim for conversion as to existing defendant ABC. Leave to amend is denied as to remaining causes of action and new defendant Pat's Liens because it would prejudice defendant by unfairly expanding scope of case too close to trial and after close of discovery. Prevailing party to prepare form of order. (301/PJB/CK) Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR #8189

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-13-2006 Case Settled - Set For Crc 525 Hearing On Mar-20-07 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212

MOTION FOR LEAVE TO Amend Complaint, Ccp.473
Off Calendar Dec-11-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Kenneth Kinnard, 567-9034, plaintiff and moving party appearing in propria persona
Samer Danfoura of the Law Offices of A. Nick Shamiyeh, 925-935-9401, appearing for defendant and responding party

This matter was not argued. Mr. Danfoura represented to the Court that defendant's opposition was timely served on the plaintiff, but the process server did not file the opposition with the Court. The Court continued PLAINTIFF KENNETH KINNARD'S MOTION FOR LEAVE TO Amend Complaint, CCP 473 to December 13, 2006. (301/PHA) JUDGE: PAUL H. ALVARADO, REPORTER, BELDON YEE, CSR# 2647

MINI MINUTES: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE TO DEFENDANT'S COUNSEL for failure to comply with San Francisco Superior Court Early Settlement Program Policies and Procedures No. 4 (Administrative fee) is ordered off calendar/Fee paid. Proceedings not reported. (212)
